title: Savory Spicy Jamaican Shrimp Noodles
description: A briny and juicy Jamaican dish featuring rice noodles and bhuna, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large tava griddle over medium heat.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the shrimp and cook until they are pink and fully cooked, about 4 minutes.
Remove the shrimp from the tava griddle and set aside.
In the same tava griddle, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the bhuna sauce, soy sauce, thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked rice noodles to the tava griddle and stir to combine with the sauce.
Return the cooked shrimp to the tava griddle and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Cook for an additional 1 minute to heat the shrimp through.
